name: adhoc_table_quality_check

nodes.error:
failed to execute step "get_table_schema": exit status 127
recent stderr (tail):
/var/lib/dagu/dags/dagu_script-3979672486.sh: line 1: curl: command not found

step.name: run_null_checks
step.description: Check for NULL values in all columns

step.name: run_uniqueness_checks
generate_quality_profile
step.description: Create data quality profile for the table
step.script:
echo "=== Data Quality Profile ===" > /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_profile_${schema}_${table}_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).json
echo '{
  "table": "'${schema}'.'${table}'",
  "timestamp": "'$(date -Iseconds)'",
  "schema": '${TABLE_SCHEMA}',
  "null_checks": '${NULL_CHECK_RESULTS}',
  "uniqueness_checks": '${UNIQUENESS_RESULTS}'
}' | jq '.' >> /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_profile_${schema}_${table}_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).json

echo "✅ Quality profile generated for ${schema}.${table}"
cat /var/lib/dagu/logs/quality_profile_${schema}_${table}_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).json

step.name: summary_report
step.script:
echo "================================"
echo "Table: ${schema}.${table}"
echo "Connection: ${connection_id}"
echo "Timestamp: $(date)"
echo "================================"
echo ""
echo "NULL Checks:"
echo "${NULL_CHECK_RESULTS}" | jq -r '.statistics'
echo ""
echo "Uniqueness Checks:"
echo "${UNIQUENESS_RESULTS}" | jq -r '.statistics'
echo ""
echo "================================"

params: default=SalesLT name=schema default=Customer name=table default=local_adventureworks name=connection_id
